content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于11月24日17:50(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年12月8日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、相位对弈
● 唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」的狂气爆发「虚妄王女」施加的状态「降生仪式」从 50 层降低为 25 层。

二、问题修复
● 修复了「神国·深海」界域下，触腕姿态切换界面的描述缺少回合冷却说明的问题。
● 修复了「调查行动-调查星辰篇-4-2」首领战时，召唤的敌人「新生」有可能重叠的问题。 
● 修复了命轮「黑暗中的安眠」、「欲海浮沉」、「于暴雨之中」中对于「降生仪式」、「反击」、「中毒」状态描述缺失的问题。 
●  修复了唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」收录语音中技能语音不全的问题。
● 修复了活动「神诞的祭礼」中，通过「敬献神明」施加的「献祭」状态与「降生仪式」施加的「献祭」状态在显示上无法正确叠加的问题。
● 修复了典藏馆中「角色」中缺少「波吕克斯」相关资料的问题。
● 修复了典藏馆中「场景CG」中「幻境」标签下部分CG无法解锁的问题。
● 修复了典藏馆中活动动画「共战原初」效果不正确的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒」中「与群星相会」唤醒体立绘附近缺乏对应的名称和图标说明，以及缺失放大镜图标、导致无法展开对应详情的问题。
● 修复了本期「融灾禁区·第 2 波」中首领战中，「熔毁·朵尔」无法获得「终末」层数的问题。
● 修复了其他语言设置中，「神国·深海」的怒涛、静海触腕效果说明错误显示为中文的问题。

**V2.4.0.5 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on November 24 at 17:50(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on December 8, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Traphase
● The Exalt "Princess of Delusions" of Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn" reduces the State "Birth Ritual" from 50 layers to 25 layers.

2. Problem Fix
● Fixed the issue where the description of the Tentacle Stance switching interface in the "Divine Realm: Aequor" Realm lacked a cooldown explanation for the turn.
● Fixed the issue where the summoned enemy "Rebirth" could overlap during the boss battle in "Investigation - Astral Reign - 4-2"
● Fixed the issue of missing descriptions for the "Birth Ritual," "Counter," and "Poison" states in the Wheels of Destiny "Uteri Somnia," "Drifting in Desire," and "Amidst the Downpour."
● Fixed the issue where the skill voice was incomplete in the voice recordings of the Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn".
● Fixed the issue in the event "Rites of Divine Birth" where the "Sacrifice Ritual" state applied by "Offering to the God" could not be correctly stacked with the "Sacrifice Ritual" state applied by "Birth Ritual" in display.

● Fixed the issue of missing "Pollux" related information in the "Characters" section of the Premium Hall.
● Fixed the issue where some CGs under the "Mirage" label in the "Premium Hall" scene CG could not be unlocked.
● Fixed the issue with the incorrect effect of the event animation "Against the Doom" in the Premium.
● Fixed the issue where the "Awaken" section lacked corresponding name and icon descriptions near the "Astral Rendezvous" Awakener illustration, as well as the missing magnifying glass icon, which prevented the expansion of relevant details.
● Fixed the issue where "Doll: Inferno" could not gain "Finale" stacks in the boss battle of this phase of "D-Effect Zone·Wave 2".
● Fixed the issue where the effects of Raging Waves and Tranquil Sea in "Divine Realm: Aequor" were incorrectly displayed in Chinese under other language settings.
What a lovely idea. Thank you so much to everyone who contributes to the translation 🙂‍↕️
thread_title: 🌟 Announcement: Exclusive Avatar Frames for Translation Volunteers and Other Localization News!
